colored_packages.ponder.dyed_packager.he: Create Colored Packages: Creating colored packages
colored_packages.ponder.dyed_packager.te: By default, Packagers will create standard packages
Right clicking on a Packager or Re-Packager will dye it
The package will now be colored off the dye applied
Dyed Packagers can be reverted to normal with a water bucket or water bottle
